title: 10 Pcs Purple Pull Bows for Gift Wrapping, 4.3 Inch Organza Ribbon Bows for Wedding Christmas Valentine's Day Birthday Party Flower Present Basket Decoration
features: Value Package: 10 pull bows for gift wrapping, ample for various decorative occasions, adding a touch of elegance and charm to presents or decorations

Vibrant Colours: We offer an array of ribbon bows in vivid, eye-catching hues, ensuring your gift wrapping and space decorations command attention and infuse every special moment with a sense of occasion
Premium Material: The pull bow is crafted from organza, offering a silky-soft texture that resists snagging and fading. It can be effortlessly secured to any item requiring decoration
Easy to Use: Find the 2 thin ribbons inside the pull bow, and by pulling it continuously, you can achieve a 3D and full-bodied spherical flower in mere seconds

Versatile Uses: Exquisite ribbon bows are not only suitable for gift wrapping, wedding decorations, bouquet tying and adorning fruit baskets, but also perfect for celebrating occasions such as Christmas, Valentine's Day, Easter and Mother's Day, creating a joyful and sweet atmosphere
